approvalNote: Peter clarified on 2026-06-03 that the learner should use the original Maya audition voice, not the younger V2 Maya prompt. This manifest preserves the V1 Maya model/settings for the learner lines only.

learner_maya.role: Selected young learner voice; original Maya audition direction

takes.speaker: young_learner
takes.text: It's working! My pond's holding water now. What can I do to attract nature? Especially frogs.

takes.speaker: young_learner
takes.text: So basically make it a good home and be patient?
